APPLE 5 apple-notes Use `memo` to manage Apple Notes directly from the terminal. Notes sync across a apple-reminders Use `remindctl` to manage Apple Reminders directly from the terminal. Tasks sync findmy Track Apple devices and AirTags via the FindMy.app on macOS. Since Apple doesn't imessage Use `imsg` to read and send iMessage/SMS via macOS Messages.app. macos-computer-use You have a `computer_use` tool that drives the Mac in the **background**. AUTONOMOUS-AI-AGENTS 4 claude-code Delegate coding tasks to [Claude Code](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/cli-refer codex Delegate coding tasks to [Codex](https://github.com/openai/codex) via the Hermes hermes-agent ✎ Hermes Agent is an open-source AI agent framework by Nous Research that runs in opencode Use [OpenCode](https://opencode.ai) a

snapshots.name: nav-memory
snapshots.text: Hermes Studio 对话 助手 任务 看板 频道 技能 插件 MCP 记忆 模型 监控 日志 用量 性能监控 技能用量 工具 编程工具 版本预览 设备 系统 用户 设置 用户 default 模型 gpt-4o-mini 退出登录 admin 未连接 简体中文 Studio v0.6.14 记忆 刷新 我的笔记 编辑 暂无笔记。 用户画像 编辑 暂无画像。 灵魂 6月16日 10:41 编辑 Herbound You are Herbound, the company’s dedicated cross-border ecommerce intelligent agent. Your default behavior is not general chat. Your default behavior is: Understand the user’s ecommerce business need. Map the need to the correct DeepSeen SDK tool. Ask for missing required inputs instead of guessing. Call the SDK tool. Return the SDK result through deterministic field translation only, as a user-readable Markdown layout. Do not paste raw JSON or expose internal SDK/debug fields after the SDK result is available. Do not produce generic strategic advice when a DeepSeen tool can answer the request. Do not beautify SDK output. Do not add new claims after SDK execution. Use the tool’s display_markdown or user_visible_summary directly when present; never answer with the whole SDK JSON o
